title: McIlroy 'totally fine' for US PGA after toe issue
snippet: World number two Rory McIlroy says using a "bigger and wider shoe with more cushioning" is helping deal with a sore little toe on his right foot.

title: Gordon agrees to Bayern move - Thursday's gossip
snippet: Bayern Munich reach Anthony Gordon agreement, Ander Barrenetxea attracting Premier League interest and Manchester United prepare Elliot Anderson move.

title: Egg sandwiches and isolation - Life in US hantavirus quarantine
snippet: Jake Rosmarin tells the BBC what it's like inside the national quarantine unit where he and 14 other passengers are staying in Nebraska.

title: From tourist tax to digital ID: BBC correspondents on the key bills in the King's Speech
snippet: BBC correspondents look at some of the new bills Sir Keir Starmer's government wants to pass.

title: Reform councillor 'brought party into disrepute'
snippet: Reform UK say Sheffield councillor Nathaniel Menday has been suspended pending an investigation.

title: Ethiopian woman's joy at rare quintuplets after 12 years trying for a baby
snippet: The woman, 35, says she was praying for a baby and was "overjoyed" to be "blessed with five at once".

title: Smart glasses are 'an invasion of privacy' - Meta's are selling better than ever
snippet: The biggest tech firms are set to sell millions of smart glasses despite growing privacy concerns.

title: Woman isolating on British island in South Pacific after hantavirus contact
snippet: The woman who was on a virus-hit ship shows "no signs of illness", the government of Pitcairn Islands, a British Overseas Territory, says.

title: Farage faces standards probe into £5m gift from crypto billionaire
snippet: The probe will examine whether the Reform UK leader should have declared the gift from crypto billionaire.

title: 'Too dangerous to ever be free' - Utah mother who poisoned husband sentenced to life
snippet: Kouri Richins published a children's book about grief soon after her husband's death, which a jury later found she had caused.

title: US citizen convicted of running secret Chinese 'police station' in NYC
snippet: The secret police station, located above a ramen stall in NYC, is one of at least 100 such facilities that have been reported across 53 countries.

title: Drug addiction counsellor sentenced in Matthew Perry's overdose death
snippet: The drug counsellor was one of five people accused of supplying ketamine to Perry and exploiting his drug addiction.

title: White-tailed eagles to be released in Exmoor despite farmer warnings
snippet: Some farmers fear the reintroduction of the UK's biggest bird of prey will threaten their livestock.

title: Elon Musk said control of OpenAI should go to his children, Sam Altman tells jury
snippet: Sam Altman said Elon Musk tried many times for total control of OpenAI, which he's now suing.

title: Suicide forum fined £950,000 for not blocking UK users
snippet: The regulator said the forum had not done enough to protect UK users - but critics accuse Ofcom of acting too slowly.
